title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Today, Kyiv commemorates the people whose lives were taken by the Russian attack yesterday, July 6. State flags are flown at half mast in the city. Canceled entertainment events. As a result of this Russian attack on Kyiv, 19 people died, 58 more were injured, including seven children. We express our sincere condolences to all those who lost their dearest ones that night. Eternal memory of the dead. Russia continues to purposefully...
description_en: Today, Kyiv commemorates the people whose lives were taken by the Russian attack yesterday, July 6. State flags are flown at half mast in the city. Canceled entertainment events. As a result of this Russian attack on Kyiv, 19 people died, 58 more were injured, including seven children. We express our sincere condolences to all those who lost their dearest ones that night. Eternal memory of the dead. Russia continues to purposefully...
description_uk: Сьогодні Київ вшановує пам'ять людей, чиї життя забрала російська атака вчора, 6 липня. У місті приспущені державні прапори. Скасовані розважальні заходи. Внаслідок цього російського удару по Києву загинули 19 людей, ще 58 зазнали поранень, серед них – семеро дітей. Висловлюємо щирі співчуття всім, хто у цю ніч втратив найдорожчих. Вічна пам'ять загиблим. Росія продовжує щодня цілеспрямовано...

title: Kherson: "We wanted to see the Nazis", - Brezhnev's great-grandson was still...

description: "We wanted to see the Nazis", - Brezhnev's great-grandson was still in Ukrainian captivity About a month ago, information appeared in the mass media that the great-grandson of the USSR Secretary General went to war against Ukraine and was captured. Now in the "I want to live" project, Anton Milaev told how he got to such a life. He says that he lived in the USA for almost 20 years, where he worked as a handyman. However, he never received a green card, therefore...
description_en: "We wanted to see the Nazis", - Brezhnev's great-grandson was still in Ukrainian captivity About a month ago, information appeared in the mass media that the great-grandson of the USSR Secretary General went to war against Ukraine and was captured. Now in the "I want to live" project, Anton Milaev told how he got to such a life. He says that he lived in the USA for almost 20 years, where he worked as a handyman. However, he never received a green card, therefore...
description_uk: "Хотели увидеть нацистов", - правнук Брежнева таки нашелся в украинском плену Около месяца назад в СМИ появилась информация, что правнук генсека СССР пошел на войну против Украины и попал в плен. Тепер в проекте "Хочу жить" Антон Милаев рассказал, как он докатился до такой жизни. Говорит, что почти 20 лет он жил в США, где работал разнорабочим. Однако грин-карту он так и не получил, поэтому,...

title: Crimea: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Some time ago, we started the Crimean operation. This is a deep strike, a middle strike. We slowed down the militarization of our peninsula occupied by Russia. Military bases, warehouses, air defense, all the platforms from which planes take off, from where we receive missile strikes, and logistics. We shut down logistics and took control of the fuel and energy complex. We have shown what it is like to operationally control the sky in a specific...
description_en: Some time ago, we started the Crimean operation. This is a deep strike, a middle strike. We slowed down the militarization of our peninsula occupied by Russia. Military bases, warehouses, air defense, all the platforms from which planes take off, from where we receive missile strikes, and logistics. We shut down logistics and took control of the fuel and energy complex. We have shown what it is like to operationally control the sky in a specific...
description_uk: Деякий час назад ми почали Кримську операцію. Це дипстрайк, мідлстрайк. Ми уповільнювали мілітаризацію окупованого Росією нашого півострова. Військові бази, склади, ППО, всі майданчики, з яких злітають літаки, звідки ми отримуємо удари ракет, і логістика. Ми перекрили логістику і взяли під контроль паливно-енергетичний комплекс. Ми показали, що таке операційно контролювати небо в конкретній...

title: This war is changing. Today, peace and victory go to whoever is...
title_en: This war is changing. Today, peace and victory go to whoever is...
title_uk: Ця війна змінюється. Сьогодні мир і перемога за тим, хто...
description: This war is changing. Today, peace and victory go to whoever is smarter. It is very difficult for us, but our soldiers stopped the war with their lives on the battlefield - the contact line. The war is on, but the front is no longer moving. When the front almost does not move and the enemy cannot enter the sea, the sky remains. Today there is a fight for the sky. This is a change in the priorities of this war. We go to heaven. And in heaven we are already a competitor. IN...
description_en: This war is changing. Today, peace and victory go to whoever is smarter. It is very difficult for us, but our soldiers stopped the war with their lives on the battlefield - the contact line. The war is on, but the front is no longer moving. When the front almost does not move and the enemy cannot enter the sea, the sky remains. Today there is a fight for the sky. This is a change in the priorities of this war. We go to heaven. And in heaven we are already a competitor. IN...
description_uk: Ця війна змінюється. Сьогодні мир і перемога за тим, хто розумніший. Нам дуже складно, але наші бійці своїми життями зупинили війну на полі бою – контактну лінію. Війна йде, але фронт уже не рухається. Коли фронт майже не рухається і на морі ворог не може зайти, залишається небо. Сьогодні йде боротьба за небо. Це зміна пріоритетів цієї війни. Ми переходимо в небо. І в небі ми вже є конкурентом. У...

title: Kyiv: Power outage reported
description: Ukrainian missiles strike Russian airport, blackout reported in bordering Belgorod Oblast. Ukrainian missiles struck Belgorod Airport, and a blackout was recorded in Belgorod Oblast amid an overnight attack on July 7, local authorities and social media channels reported.

title: Ukraine can still receive MiG-29 fighters from Poland Defense...

description: Ukraine can still receive MiG-29 fighters from Poland Defense Minister Vladyslav Kosyniak-Kamysh said that the question still remains open. According to him, Warsaw is considering Kiev's request: "Such a possibility is realistic, but it should be an exchange, not just a one-way transfer from Poland." We are talking about the transfer of Ukrainian drone technologies in exchange for aircraft. Earlier...
description_en: Ukraine can still receive MiG-29 fighters from Poland Defense Minister Vladyslav Kosyniak-Kamysh said that the question still remains open. According to him, Warsaw is considering Kiev's request: "Such a possibility is realistic, but it should be an exchange, not just a one-way transfer from Poland." We are talking about the transfer of Ukrainian drone technologies in exchange for aircraft. Earlier...
description_uk: Украина все же может получить от Польши истребители МиГ-29 Министр обороны Владислав Косиняк-Камыш заявил, что вопрос все еще остается открытым. По его словам, Варшава рассматривает запрос Киева: «Такая возможность реалистична, но это должен быть именно обмен, а не просто односторонняя передача со стороны Польши». Речь идет о передаче украинских дроновых технологий взамен на самолеты. Ранее...

title: Airstrike attack
description: Russia is preparing to launch another massive combined strike against Ukraine already this week, monitors report. Earlier, the speaker of the Air Force Ignat said that the Russian Federation is ready for a new massive strike, it could happen at least tomorrow.
description_en: Russia is preparing to launch another massive combined strike against Ukraine already this week, monitors report. Earlier, the speaker of the Air Force Ignat said that the Russian Federation is ready for a new massive strike, it could happen at least tomorrow.
description_uk: Россия готовится нанести ещё один массированный комбинированный удар по Украине уже на этой неделе, сообщают мониторы. Ранее спикер Воздушных сил Игнат заявил, что рф уже готова к новому массированному удару, он может произойти хоть завтра.

Він є найпотужнішим нафтопереробним...

title: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥...
title_en: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥...

description: 🇵🇱 Poland will declassify data on all military aid to Ukraine 👥 Minister of Defense of Poland Władysław Kosiniak-Kamysh instructed to declassify data on military aid to Ukraine for the years 2022-2026. The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...

The decision was made after consultation with Prime Minister Donald Tusk. In addition, the Polish Military Counterintelligence Service (SKW) will investigate the disclosure of state secrets. 🖋 The process of transferring equipment to Ukraine...
description_uk: 🇵🇱 Польща розсекретить дані про всю військову допомогу Україні 👥 Міністр оборони Польщі Владислав Косіняк-Камиш доручив розсекретити дані про військову допомогу Україні за 2022–2026 роки. Рішення ухвалене після консультації з прем’єр-міністром Дональдом Туском. Крім того, польська Служба військової контррозвідки (SKW) розслідуватиме розкриття державної таємниці. 🖋 Процес передачі техніки Україні...
